discovery.name: EXISTING_SUPPLIER_ADDRESS_AND_PROC_BU
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT sv.vendor_name AS VNAME, sv.vendor_id AS VID, bu.bu_name AS BUNAME, bu.bu_id AS BUID, ps.party_site_name AS PSN, ss.party_site_id AS PSID FROM poz_supplier_sites_all_m ss JOIN poz_suppliers_v sv ON sv.vendor_id = ss.vendor_id JOIN fun_all_business_units_v bu ON bu.bu_id = ss.prc_bu_id JOIN hz_party_sites ps ON ps.party_site_id = ss.party_site_id WHERE NVL(ss.inactive_date, SYSDATE+1) > SYSDATE AND ps.party_site_name IS NOT NULL AND sv.vendor_name NOT LIKE '%RT %' AND sv.vendor_name NOT LIKE '%RT-%' AND bu.bu_name = 'US1 Business Unit' ORDER BY ps.party_site_name) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

base_read.sql: SELECT vendor_site_code AS VENDOR_SITE_CODE, vendor_site_id AS VENDOR_SITE_ID, vendor_id AS VENDOR_ID FROM poz_supplier_sites_all_m WHERE vendor_site_code LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-SITE-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT i.vendor_site_code AS VENDOR_SITE_CODE, i.vendor_site_interface_id AS SITE_INTERFACE_ID, i.status AS IFACE_STATUS, i.vendor_site_id AS IFACE_VENDOR_SITE_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(CASE WHEN r.attribute IS NOT NULL THEN r.reject_lookup_code || ' [' || r.attribute || ']' ELSE r.reject_lookup_code END, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rejection_id) FROM poz_supplier_int_rejections r WHERE r.parent_table = 'POZ_SUPPLIER_SITES_INT' AND r.parent_id = i.vendor_site_interface_id) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM poz_supplier_sites_int i WHERE i.load_request_id = :LRID
